name: Feature request
about: Something you want BlastGuard to do that it currently doesn't
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

<!-- What are you trying to accomplish? Concrete use case beats abstract
wish. "I want a `similar functions` search" is better than "BlastGuard
should have more search features." -->

## Proposed shape

<!-- Optional. If you have a specific API in mind, describe it. Pseudo-code
or an MCP tool-call example is fine. -->

## Phase discipline check

<!-- BlastGuard gates Phase 2 work on Phase 1 benchmark evidence (see
SPEC.md §Decision Log). If your request would land semantic search,
Go support, or extra cascade detectors, confirm you've read the
evidence-first stance and explain why your use case warrants the scope. -->

- [ ] I've checked `SPEC.md` and this isn't already listed as deferred.
- [ ] I've read `CLAUDE.md`'s "phases are not optional" note.

## Prior art

<!-- Is there an MCP server, research paper, or tool that does this
already? Link it. "Related work" framing is preferred over "competitor"
framing — BlastGuard sits in an ecosystem. -->
